subcodes.title: Words to a reporter from the Post, spoken on 1912-10-04
subcodes.first_line: In this enlightened age everything has been renewed--sciences have been renewed, new arts have come into being
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این قرن نورانی جمیع امور تجدید شده علوم تجدد یافته فنون جدید
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
